title: SessionStart takes the compact branch
action: Per D5/D6/D8/D19/D20. In hooks/bee-session-init.mjs: when payload.source === 'compact', append the resume compaction record and emit buildCompactCapsule instead of buildSessionPreamble; every other source keeps buildSessionPreamble byte-identical (D8). LEAVE intentLeadBlock AND ANCHOR_LEAD_SOURCES COMPLETELY UNTOUCHED (D19): the hook keeps prefixing the anchor on compact and resume exactly as today, so the emitted shape stays `anchor + \n\n + body` and only the body changes. ADOPT_SOURCES and the handoff adoption path are untouched; buildSessionPreamble keeps rendering its own handoff block — the capsule re-renders it, it does not move it. The hook stays a thin caller: no logic here, it all lives in compaction.mjs (D3). Extend scripts/test_compact_capsule.mjs with the through-the-hook rows: a compact SessionStart emits anchor-then-capsule with the anchor appearing exactly ONCE; a resume SessionStart still emits anchor-then-full-preamble. Mirror the hook to .bee/bin/hooks/ and re-run the self-onboard (D20). RED-FAILURE EVIDENCE IS REQUIRED AT CAP: write the new hook rows first, record their failing output against the un-wired hook, then wire it — the recorded red is cap evidence, not optional.

truths: The anchor appears exactly ONCE in a compact SessionStart's output — asserted by count, not by startsWith.
hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs is green with zero edits, including the resume additivity row and the two HANDOFF rows at :2427-2455 and :2854-2883.
The recorded red output of the new rows against the un-wired hook is attached as cap evidence.
artifacts: The compact branch in bee-session-init.mjs, its mirror, and the through-the-hook test rows
prohibitions: Never edit hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs — it must stay green untouched.
Never put capsule logic in the hook.

verify: node scripts/test_compact_capsule.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/ledger_parity.mjs --check

trace.dropped_reason: Revision 2 failed validation (6 CRITICAL). Superseded by revision 3 under D23-D26: widened regen trigger, PreCompact row split, four-way count vocabulary, corrected handoffOutcome premise.
